channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Meta Turns to Space-Based Solar Energy to Power AI Data Centers on Earth
item.description: Facebook parent company Meta secured up to 1 gigawatt of orbital solar power as AI drives demand for electricity.

item.title: Crypto projects shut down as token models fail under pressure
item.description: Crypto projects are shutting down as token funding weakens and fragmented structures leave them with limited options to restructure or recover.

item.title: Japan tells real estate and crypto sectors to tighten AML checks on property deals
item.description: Four Japanese government agencies have warned against the AML risks posed by crypto in real estate transactions, instructing industry bodies to enforce stricter compliance.

item.title: Galaxy Digital delivers first data center tranche to CoreWeave after narrowing Q1 loss
item.description: Galaxy secured approval to double its Helios data center power capacity to over 1.6GW, building on its strategic expansion into AI infrastructure.

item.title: New wallet offers way to tackle Bitcoin’s quantum risk without a fork
item.description: The Postquant Labs project uses Arch Network to deliver post-quantum signature protection without a Bitcoin soft fork, sidestepping both Jameson Lopp's freeze proposal and Paul Sztorc's hard fork.

item.title: Stablecoin payroll gets built-in yield with Paxos–Toku integration
item.description: The integration lets employees earn yield on stablecoin-paid salaries without moving funds or giving up custody.

item.title: Aave-linked DeFi United unveils rsETH recovery plan after $293M Kelp exploit
item.description: DeFi United published a technical plan to restore rsETH backing and unwind attacker-linked DeFi positions after the $293 million Kelp exploit.

item.title: Visa is teaming up with a Tether co-founder to build onchain banks
item.description: Collins wants to bring robust stablecoin payments infrastructure to under-banked people around the planet.

item.title: White House Crypto Adviser Hints at ‘Breakthrough’ Bitcoin Reserve Move
item.description: A "big announcement" on the U.S. Bitcoin strategic reserve could drop soon, but Treasury and a stalled Senate bill continue to set limits.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Stellar (XLM) drops 1.7% as index moves lower
item.description: Hedera (HBAR), down 0.9% since Monday, was also an underperformer.

item.title: CFTC's AI will review U.S. crypto registration applications, chairman tells CoinDesk
item.description: The regulator is working on new technology to stretch abilities of reduced staff, says Chairman Mike Selig, including AI monitoring of trading data.

item.title: Startale to add Privacy Boost transfers to Sony-linked Soneium app
item.description: Startale plans to integrate Sunnyside Labs’ Privacy Boost into its Soneium app, adding private transfers with audit-friendly compliance controls.

item.title: Stablecoin transfer volume drops 19% even as supply keeps rising: RWA.xyz
item.description: Stablecoin transfer volume fell more than 19% in 30 days even as supply, holders and active addresses continued to climb.

item.title: Bitcoin's Next Move Hinges on $82K CME Gap as Earnings, FOMC Loom
item.description: Big Tech earnings and the FOMC are challenging investor risk appetite, with $82K as a make-or-break level for Bitcoin’s recovery rally.

item.title: Ondo brings proxy voting to tokenized stocks and ETFs with Broadridge
item.description: Tokenized stock holders can now participate in corporate governance, closing a long-standing gap between onchain securities and their traditional counterparts.

item.title: Is Ethereum safe above $2K? Traders are watching these ETH price levels
item.description: Ethereum market participants saw the 100-day SMA at $2,200 as particularly important for bulls to hold to avoid a deeper correction.

item.title: Morning Minute: Fidelity Is Cautiously Bullish on Crypto
item.description: Fidelity says crypto may finally be finding its floor, while the White House is teasing a major strategic Bitcoin reserve update.

item.title: Bulls want bitcoin back above $80,000. Macro says not so fast.
item.description: What you need to know for April 28, 2026

item.title: OpenAI Fell Short of Its Own Targets as Compute Costs Piled Up: Report
item.description: Internal stumbles over ChatGPT growth and a looming IPO are putting Sam Altman's spend-everything compute strategy under the microscope.

item.title: OKX lets institutions use BlackRock’s BUIDL fund as trading collateral
item.description: OKX integrates BlackRock’s tokenized Treasury fund into Standard Chartered custody, allowing institutions to use it as regulated trading collateral.

item.title: Crypto traders turn cautious as bitcoin loses steam below $80,000
item.description: Bitcoin drops after repeated resistance at $80,000, taking ether with it, while derivatives and macro signals point to reduced risk appetite and subdued volatility.

item.title: Jack Dorsey's Block Discloses $2.2B Bitcoin Holdings in Q1 Proof-of-Reserves Report
item.description: The fintech company's third-party audited disclosure shows $1.5 billion in customer Bitcoin and $692 million in corporate treasury holdings.

item.title: A digital shekel is here: Israel approves its first regulated stablecoin
item.description: BILS was developed in collaboration with the Solana network and crypto custodian heavyweights Fireblocks with auditing oversight provided by Big Four consultancy firm EY.

item.title: Changelly and Tonkeeper enable cross-chain deposits to TON across 13 networks
item.description: Changelly and Tonkeeper have teamed up to make cross-chain deposits into TON a seamless, in-wallet experience.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs snap nine-day inflow run as BTC slips below $77K
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs post $263 million in outflows, ending a nine-day inflow streak as Bitcoin failed to reclaim $80,000 in its latest run.

item.title: Jack Dorsey's Block nears 9,000 bitcoin in treasury after Q1 addition
item.description: The firm added 114 BTC to its corporate treasury, for a total of 8,997 BTC, and said it plans to issue regular third-party reports.

item.title: Bitcoin miner Core Scientific shifts to AI with 1.5GW data center push
item.description: Core Scientific is converting its Pecos, Texas site into a high-density AI colocation hub, repurposing 300MW of mining capacity.

item.title: Bitmine's ether buys are catching up to Strategy's bitcoin accumulation pace
item.description: Bitmine bought $234 million of ether in its largest weekly purchase this year, closing in on Strategy's regular bitcoin buys once the firm's STRC-fueled spikes are stripped out.

item.title: Ondo Finance adds proxy voting for holders of its $700 million tokenized equities
item.description: The move aims to bring Ondo's tokenized stocks and ETFs closer to traditional ones held in a brokerage account.

item.title: Trump changes tune on prediction markets days after saying he disliked them
item.description: US President Donald Trump says the US can’t be “left out in the cold” on prediction markets just days after he said he was “not happy” with the fast-growing platforms.

item.title: Crypto lobby backs formal removal of ‘reputation risk’ from bank examinations
item.description: The Office of the Comptroller of the Currency and the Federal Deposit Insurance Corp. finalized a similar rule removing reputation risk earlier this month.

item.title: Three Bitcoin charts say BTC price may rally toward $82K
item.description: Bitcoin’s ascending channel setup and rising stablecoin inflows suggest improving liquidity conditions could support a push toward higher price levels.

item.title: Three Bank of Japan members call for a rate hike; yen rises while bitcoin falls
item.description: Markets are pricing in a June rate hike after a split BoJ vote that saw three policymakers dissent in favor of a hike.

item.title: Acting AG Todd Blanche confirms ‘code is not a crime’ in DOJ pivot
item.description: Acting US Attorney General Todd Blanche said developers will no longer be investigated or charged unless they knowingly help third parties commit crimes.

item.title: Dorsey's Block unveils Bitcoin proof-of-reserves in transparency move
item.description: Block’s proof-of-reserves will enable anyone to verify the company’s 8,883 Bitcoin stash worth over $680 million through an on-chain signature.

item.title: What next as XRP drops 3% under $1.40 on strong selling
item.description: High-volume breakdown confirms sellers in control, with failed support turning into a key pivot as downside targets come into focus.

item.title: Solana clients Anza and Firedancer introduce post-quantum solution Falcon
item.description: Jump Crypto, the team behind Firedancer, said Falcon has the smallest signature among NIST standards, which could help preserve Solana’s high-throughput capabilities.

item.title: Bitcoin loses $77,000, ether, solana slide as Hormuz standoff lifts oil to 3-week high
item.description: Bitcoin traded at $76,923 on Tuesday morning, down 2.4% over 24 hours after rejecting $79,400 the previous day, with the entire top 10 closing red as Brent crude extended its rally to a seventh straight day.

item.title: Scammers use Gmail dot alias trick to spoof Robinhood in phishing scam
item.description: Visiting the fake login website alone isn’t enough for hackers to gain entry to accounts. However, entering sensitive information such as passwords could grant them access.

item.title: Tillis won’t support Senate crypto bill without ethics provision
item.description: Democrats seeking to crack down on the Trump family’s crypto empire have found an ally in Republican Thom Tillis, who supports ethics provisions in a key crypto bill.

item.title: Bitcoin pressured by Fed uncertainty, oil, and AI slowdown
item.description: Enflux points to oil-driven inflation as the main constraint, while questions around AI demand could reshape miner selling in the months ahead.

item.title: Arthur Hayes: War Spending to Drive Bitcoin to $125K by Year-End At Bitcoin Vegas 2026, BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes predicted BTC will reach $125,000 by year-end, driven by massive liquidity from wartime defense spending and U.S. banking deregula - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE90M3RBd21ZOG83dk1aTW12LXQtVDYtRUNmenJIRjJwQjF3eEZmT2RoV3llQ3JwZVdMVHhGdy10S0lodkliM0paM2REUmFkdGY2TGw1WWxEV2FUM0R4Z3FMRDd5VQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Arthur Hayes: War Spending to Dr…

item.title: $100,000 invested 5 years ago in Ethereum $ETH is worth $85,000 today. $100,000 invested 5 years ago in Nvidia $NVDA is worth $1,400,000 today. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBJd3ZYN2VJNFBXRnU1VkZQdE1uRXlDMjFLbjRoV2tlVW9Hd2g5MVRtcDNCeFNxM2dCOGlUTUNLeU1qUk8wVkctRkh5ck9JOG1KcV9LRTBKYkt6Y3J5OEM4dGR3?oc=5" target="_blank">$100,000 invested 5 years ago in E…

item.title: 🔥 NOW: Michael Saylor says the Bitcoin and crypto communities' interests are now starting to overlap. "All of them will drive demand for Bitcoin." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1FbFZ2X2x5N3NFeXJiNk5CWFMyQXdZeDFmTkRpWURDNGdZdHg0Nm9vQkdGbU1VaGpNU0QwaE5pX3VwYk9oLUpIMWVMYlgxa1RPVXdkMm9BWnVZSVcwVDhMbXhqWGQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 NOW: Michael Saylor says the…

item.title: Elon Musk’s Fight With Colorado Over AI Law Hits Pause as State Considers Revisions
item.description: The joint motion halts deadlines and enforcement in xAI’s lawsuit while Colorado lawmakers weigh changes to the state’s AI bias law.

item.title: 🇺🇸 BIG: White House crypto advisor Patrick Witt says a “big announcement” on Trump’s Bitcoin reserve is coming within weeks. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9vRUZOcnJ6RlkwQ184b2NrQ0VpTGVSY3dWR1Rpc3F2NnlCbm1Gc3dnRXVzNHJKZWNLYWhFNFJEMUQxaTRyb0s3YWhhclhRUV9WdnQzVm5ZcU4zRWRQR18zdjRNdDk?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 BIG: White House crypto ad…

item.title: Industry leaders are pouring hundreds of millions into a rescue plan for Aave users after massive crypto hack
item.description: The response to the DeFi recovery fund has quickly extended beyond Aave, and in some cases began with direct outreach.

item.title: Bitcoin rally shows signs of fatigue as key indicators turn bearish
item.description: Cooling U.S. demand, elevated Bitfinex whale positioning and a key on chain rejection point to short term downside during the Las Vegas Bitcoin conference.

item.title: Aave-Led 'DeFi United' Relief Effort Raises $300 Million to Cover Kelp DAO Exploit Losses
item.description: The Aave-led relief effort has gained widespread support, securing enough commitments to replenish the swiped funds.

item.title: OpenAI Is Building Its Own Smartphone Chip With Qualcomm and MediaTek: Report
item.description: Six weeks after telling staff to stop chasing distractions, OpenAI is reportedly planning a phone targeting 400 million units a year.

item.title: Western Union eyeing stablecoin launch to settle global transactions without SWIFT, CEO says
item.description: The 175-year-old money-transfer firm also plans to issue a stablecoin-linked card for payments and cash-out options from crypto to local currencies, CEO Devin McGranahan said.

item.title: Bitcoin Developer Plans to 'Reassign' Coins Linked to Satoshi Nakamoto in Hard Fork
item.description: Paul Sztorc’s proposed eCash fork would give investors coins cloned from wallets believed to belong to Bitcoin creator Satoshi Nakamoto.

item.title: Taylor Swift Seeks Trademarks for Her Voice and Image to Fight AI Fakes
item.description: The trademark applications aim to strengthen her ability to fight AI-generated deepfakes, as image generation tools advance.

item.title: Fed Confirms What Tech Developers Have Feared for Two Years
item.description: A new Federal Reserve study links ChatGPT's launch to a sharp halving of U.S. programmer job growth—the first institutional-level evidence connecting AI adoption to measurable developer hiring declines.

item.title: We're excited to announce that the @Paxos Crypto Brokerage now supports $PENGU. With this partnership, $PENGU can now be listed on some of the largest retail trading platforms and exchanges used by over 500 million people worldwide. More informatio - x.com

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 SEC Chair Paul Atkins says crypto & blockchain innovation will "strengthen" the US economy and financial system. - x.com

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 US Senator Cynthia Lummis announces Bitcoin and crypto market structure legislation will get marked up "in May." 👀 "We are gonna get it to the finish line." 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBpcDcxSHNjTFotVjNHUThNemFlaloteHNiWmhWZEpPcGdWS0lDNWZWYmVLc0FWXzRJNjFEOWx2cjh5Y1R1WlZKMTM2ak9RSmxtc2Zucm51M2lRLW1uRDJwemVxTWJDTUE?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 US Senator Cy…

item.title: OFAC Updates Central Bank of Iran Designation Following Record $344 Million Tether Seizure amid Strait of Hormuz Toll Controversy
item.description: On April 24, 2026, the U.S. Department of the Treasury’s Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) updated its designation of… The post OFAC Updates Central Bank of Iran Designation Following Record $344 Million Tether Seizure amid Strait of…

item.title: Malicious Web Pages Are Hijacking AI Agents, And Some Are Going After Your PayPal
item.description: Google's security team scanned billions of web pages and found real payloads designed to trick AI agents into sending money, deleting files, and leaking credentials.

item.title: T Rowe Active Crypto ETF filing with 3rd amendment. Ticker $TOKN, fee 75bps. Launch likely very soon. The reason this one is notable imo is because it’s by far biggest active manager to apply their active prowess to this space. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE04ZDl4N0dSbVVzNEJuVlBsWE1KV1VTS0VnNmRrT2FpcjZNbk5ZdzV3Zkp3d1h5bmJXcklqWmZ0VlhIbE9CMENRSWZYSkxOMURsbG4wX09JTnM3TXdDWTY3c3EwNUU?oc=5" target="_blank">T Rowe Active Crypto ETF filing…
